name: The Heartland Hero
overview: Former loan shark Mao Ge had his leg broken by his enemy after he was released from prison. He started a second-hand goods business with Yiyuan, an ex-convict too. Qiu Jingwen, once a delinquent Mao Ge dated, sublet her toast shop space to Mao reluctantly. Jingwen’s cousin Qingtian, a prison officer, helps out at the toast shop and she is skeptical of Mao and Yiyuan turning over a new leaf...

trailers.title: ８频道：《邻里帮》【The Heartland Hero】（9月1日起，星期一至五，晚上7点30分）预告-1
